reviews.author: Kimmie Snyder
reviews.text: Reuben was flexible with scheduling, fair with pricing, and he did beautiful work! I will definitely use him again and recommend him to friends!

reviews.author: Gabriella Marvin
reviews.text: Ruben came to our new house on a Sunday afternoon to clean a few rugs. He was on time and communicative about his process. While we were unpacking a moving truck I was injured and Ruben jumped in to help us finish unload! Great guy, and great service. 10/10 would recommend!

reviews.author: Cindy Espinoza
reviews.text: Very happy with Dream Steam! Rueben was prompt, friendly and efficient….all at a fair price! I had a 16 foot vintage sofa cleaned along with two vintage oriental rugs. All look amazing . Would definitely call again

reviews.author: Erin Wright
reviews.text:
Great work at a great price!!
Dream Steam Fabric Cleaners cleaned all of the carpets in our large school building. Reuben even moved the furniture to get to the kids' paint stains, etc. He did an excellent job and was very thorough. I highly recommend his services!

reviews.author: Jessica Dill
reviews.text: Reuben was fantastic, I’m extremely pleased with his work! I really appreciate that he took the time to carefully inspect the problem areas and laid out all my options up front. He could have easily upsold/oversold me services, but that’s not how he does business. And most importantly, my light beige sofa and white thick pile area rug are back to looking brand new!! Call Reuben if you want to do business with a great guy who does great work!
